title: The local symmetry condition in the Heisenberg group
abstract: I propose an analogue in the first Heisenberg group $\mathbb{H}$ of David and Semmes' local symmetry condition (LSC). For closed $3$-regular sets $E \subset \mathbb{H}$, I show that the (LSC) is implied by the $L^{2}(\mathcal{H}^{3}|_{E})$ boundedness of $3$-dimensional singular integrals with horizontally antisymmetric kernels, and that the (LSC) implies the weak geometric lemma for vertical $β$-numbers.
